# Pratham Kadam

> Official portfolio website of Pratham Kadam, a freelance full stack developer in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India.

Pratham Kadam builds SEO-friendly business websites, custom web apps, e-commerce websites, website redesigns, and technical SEO foundations with Next.js, React, Node.js, MongoDB, and modern frontend tooling.

## Canonical Site

- Website: https://prathamkadam.netlify.app/
- About Pratham Kadam: https://prathamkadam.netlify.app/about-pratham-kadam
- Full LLM context: https://prathamkadam.netlify.app/llms-full.txt
- Machine-readable AI summary: https://prathamkadam.netlify.app/ai-summary.json
- Sitemap: https://prathamkadam.netlify.app/sitemap.xml

## Important Pages

- Services: https://prathamkadam.netlify.app/services
- Portfolio: https://prathamkadam.netlify.app/my-work
- Blog: https://prathamkadam.netlify.app/blog
- Contact: https://prathamkadam.netlify.app/contact

## Primary Services

- Business website development
- Custom web application development
- E-commerce website development
- Website redesign and technical SEO
- Website maintenance and support
